notes: Mayo Clinic FAQ on flaxseed; reputable institution but consumer Q&A format not a primary study
Fiber-mortality meta-analysis; cited as contextual evidence for flaxseed fiber content
GeroScience 2025 review: dietary flaxseed cardiometabolic benefits and healthy aging; covers BP, lipids, glucose, inflammation, and aging mechanisms; dose guidance 30g/day for 12+ weeks
2025 systematic review and meta-analysis of 18 RCTs; flaxseed reduces SBP -4.75 mmHg and DBP -3.09 mmHg in people with cardiovascular risk factors; notes significant heterogeneity
2025 PMC comprehensive review (PMID 40142110) of flaxseed pros/cons; covers lignans cancer RCT data (Ki-67 labeling), fiber stats, FLAX-PAD trial cardiovascular data; broad secondary source
